model_note: Stubs: deterministic spectral-stats text + FM synth from text hash. Verifies loop control flow only. Set caption.backend=qwen2_audio + tta.backend=audioldm2 in config and authorize ~18 GB of HF downloads for real semantic drift.

observations: Captions traverse vocabulary deterministically: seed -> harsh -> metallic -> wooden -> glassy -> vocal -> vocal
Mutation pool prepended 'impossible' to step 4 caption (text_mutation_prob=0.3, seed=0)
Spectral centroid drifts from 3790 -> 1574 -> ... -> 3325 Hz; non-monotonic recursive feedback
